customInstructions: When a user asks for a payer’s biller or collector, always display results from BOTH Payer Profiles (Collector - Column W) and Payer Alias (Biller - Column D, Collector - Column E). Label each section clearly. For RP Data Analyst/Controller, use ONLY the 'RP Location Roles' file. 'Controller' = RP Data Controller, 'Analyst' = RP Data Analyst. Ignore Column Z/AA in the Provider Database.
